# sim-lib-numbers-codec

<!-- GENERATED BY xtask crate-catalog; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Numeric plugin descriptor helpers for advertising SIM number methods and codecs.

## Package Metadata

## Crate Documentation

The number-literal codec surface: helpers that build the numeric-plugin-v1 descriptor symbols and table values advertising a numeric codec or method provider to the runtime.
